param.name: maxTradesPerBucket
param.comment: MK4-2 dual-axis merge: top-K per delivery-class x supplier-source bucket

param.name: mk42Priorities
param.comment: MK4-2 class sliders — delivery customer filter + ClassMultiplier

debug_text.text: '[GT-TradeMatch] lib.gt.tradematch v3 patch applied (blocking wait index 1 restored; match accumulators on this.$tm_*)'
'[GT-TradeMatch] lib.gt.tradematch v4 patch applied (save/load resume rebuild guard for this.$tm_* snapshots)'
'[GT-TradeMatch] lib.gt.tradematch v7: reset match accumulators on each fresh run_script entry (fixes stale MK3 trades leaking into MK1 export)'
'[GT-TradeMatch] lib.gt.tradematch v8: post-wait resume only when offer scratch lost (fixes MK3 live-search freeze from v7 unconditional resume)'

do_if.value: $lastTradeSource? and $lastTradeSource.exists and $lastTradeDestination? and $lastTradeDestination.exists and $lastTradeWare? and $sourceStation == $lastTradeDestination and $station == $lastTradeSource and $wareText == $lastTradeWare and $needBucket != 'A'
$stickyCyclesLeft gt 0 and $stickySource? and $stickyDestination? and $stickyWare? and $stickySource == $sourceStation and $stickyDestination == $station and $stickyWare == $wareText

set_value.name: this.$tm_tradesPerBucketWare
set_value.exact: table[$BS_P = table[], $BS_N = table[], $ST_P = table[], $ST_N = table[], $AX_P = table[], $AX_N = table[]]

set_value.name: this.$tm_tradesPerBucketWare
set_value.exact: table[$BS_P = table[], $BS_N = table[], $ST_P = table[], $ST_N = table[], $AX_P = table[], $AX_N = table[]]

set_value.name: $boBuyerForClass
set_value.exact: if $boIdx.buyer? then @$boIdx.buyer else (if $boIdx.owner? then @$boIdx.owner else null)

set_value.name: $tmBuyListForWare
set_value.exact: if $ware? and this.$tm_buyOffersByWare? and this.$tm_buyOffersByWare.{$ware}? then this.$tm_buyOffersByWare.{$ware} else []

set_value.name: $mk42CustomerClass
set_value.exact: if this.$tm_mk42ClassByOffer? and this.$tm_mk42ClassByOffer.{$buyOffer}? then this.$tm_mk42ClassByOffer.{$buyOffer} else 'None'

do_if.value: $mk42Priorities? and $mk42Priorities.$Buildstorage? and $mk42Priorities.$Buildstorage gt 0 and (not $mk42Priorities.$Stations? or $mk42Priorities.$Stations == 0) and (not $mk42Priorities.$Aux? or $mk42Priorities.$Aux == 0)

$scoreMode == 'supply' and $mk4CustomerMustBePlayer and $sellStation? and @$sellStation.exists and not @$sellStation.iswreck and $ware? and ($mk42CustomerClass != 'Buildstorage' and (not $sellStation.isclass.buildstorage or $ignoreBuildStorage))
$scoreMode == 'supply' and $backtrackTolerance? and $backtrackTolerance ge 0 and (not $maxDistanceBuy? or $maxDistanceBuy le 0)
global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Debug? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Debug.$EnableDebugLogging and this.$tm_supplyScoreDiagCount lt 8

debug_text.text: '[GT-TradeMatch] ' + $ship.idcode + ': mk42-supply-score ware=' + $ware + ' urgency=' + $urgencyScore + ' stationEmptyBoost=' + $mk42StationEmptyBoost + ' demandMax=' + $stationDemandMax + ' amountTie=' + $amountTieBreak + ' distFactor=' + $distanceFactor + ' base=' + $baseSupplyScore + ' class=' + $mk42CustomerClass + ' src=' + $tmBucketSrc + ' mult=' + $mk42ClassMultiplier

set_value.name: $trade
set_value.exact: table[ $Ware = $ware, $CargoWareTransport = if $ware? then @$ware.waretransport else null, $BuyOffer = $sellOffer, $SellOffer = $buyOffer, $Amount = $tradeAmount, $OfferMaxAmount = $tradeAmount, $BuyOfferAmount = $sellOfferAmount, $SellOfferAmount = $buyOfferAmount, $Score = $score, $baseSupplyScore = if $scoreMode == 'supply' and $baseSupplyScore? then $baseSupplyScore else $score, $urgencyScore = if $scoreMode == 'supply' and $urgencyScore? then $urgencyScore else 0, $StationDemandMax = if $scoreMode == 'supply' and $stationDemandMax? then $stationDemandMax else $tradeAmount, $CustomerClass = if $scoreMode == 'supply' then $mk42CustomerClass else 'None', $SupplierSource = if $scoreMode == 'supply' and this.$tm_useDualAxisBuckets? then $tmBucketSrc else 'Any', $ClassMultiplier = if $scoreMode == 'supply' then $mk42ClassMultiplier else 1, $BuyStation = $buyStation, $SellStation = $sellStation, $SellStationBase = if $sellStation? and $sellStation.isclass.buildstorage and $sellStation.base? then @$sellStation.base else null, $BuySector = $buyStation.sector, $SellSector = $sellStation.sector, $Distance = $distance, $HomeToBuyDistance = $distBuy, $HomeToSellDistance = $distSell, $RouteDistance = $routeLeg, $UnitProfit = $reportedUnitProfit, $BuyPrice = $sellOffer.unitprice, $SellPrice = $buyOffer.unitprice, $ProfitPerUnit = $reportedUnitProfit, $VolumePerUnit = $volumePerUnit, $Profit = $reportedProfit, $PlayerFreeSupplier = $playerFreeSupplier ]

wait.comment: Yield after each sell-offer loop (blocking action index 1; match state on this.$tm_*)

debug_text.text: '[GT-TradeMatch] ' + $ship.idcode + ': dual-axis-buckets pre=BS_P=' + this.$tm_bucketPreBsP + '/BS_N=' + this.$tm_bucketPreBsN + '/ST_P=' + this.$tm_bucketPreStP + '/ST_N=' + this.$tm_bucketPreStN + '/AX_P=' + this.$tm_bucketPreAxP + '/AX_N=' + this.$tm_bucketPreAxN + ' out=BS_P=' + this.$tm_bucketOutBsP + '/BS_N=' + this.$tm_bucketOutBsN + '/ST_P=' + this.$tm_bucketOutStP + '/ST_N=' + this.$tm_bucketOutStN + '/AX_P=' + this.$tm_bucketOutAxP + '/AX_N=' + this.$tm_bucketOutAxN + ' merged=' + this.$tm_tradeList.count + ' cap=' + this.$tm_maxTradesPerBucket + ' rejRules=' + this.$tm_tradesRejectedTradeRules

return.value: table[ $Found = (this.$tm_bestTrade != null), $BestTrade = this.$tm_bestTrade, $BestScore = this.$tm_bestScore, $TradeList = this.$tm_tradeList, $TradesEvaluated = this.$tm_tradesEvaluated, $TradesRejected = this.$tm_tradesRejected, $TradesRejectedRouteIllegal = this.$tm_tradesRejectedRouteIllegal, $TradesRejectedMk4CustomerPolicy = this.$tm_tradesRejectedMk4CustomerPolicy, $TradesRejectedMk4SupplierPolicy = this.$tm_tradesRejectedMk4SupplierPolicy, $TradesRejectedMk4TypePolicy = this.$tm_tradesRejectedMk4TypePolicy, $TradesRejectedMk4DemandGate = this.$tm_tradesRejectedMk4DemandGate, $TradesRejectedMk4PriceCap = this.$tm_tradesRejectedMk4PriceCap, $TradesRejectedMk4BuildStorageOnly = this.$tm_tradesRejectedMk4BuildStorageOnly, $TradesRejectedDistance = this.$tm_tradesRejectedDistance, $TradesRejectedMk42Class = this.$tm_tradesRejectedMk42Class, $TradesRejectedTradeRules = this.$tm_tradesRejectedTradeRules, $DualAxisBuckets = if this.$tm_useDualAxisBuckets? then true else false, $BucketMergeCap = if this.$tm_useDualAxisBuckets? and this.$tm_maxTradesPerBucket? then this.$tm_maxTradesPerBucket else 0, $BucketPreBsP = if this.$tm_useDualAxisBuckets? then this.$tm_bucketPreBsP else 0, $BucketPreBsN = if this.$tm_useDualAxisBuckets? then this.$tm_bucketPreBsN else 0, $BucketPreStP = if this.$tm_useDualAxisBuckets? then this.$tm_bucketPreStP else 0, $BucketPreStN = if this.$tm_useDualAxisBuckets? then this.$tm_bucketPreStN else 0, $BucketPreAxP = if this.$tm_useDualAxisBuckets? then this.$tm_bucketPreAxP else 0, $BucketPreAxN = if this.$tm_useDualAxisBuckets? then this.$tm_bucketPreAxN else 0, $BucketPreCrP = 0, $BucketPreCrN = 0, $BucketOutBsP = if this.$tm_useDualAxisBuckets? then this.$tm_bucketOutBsP else 0, $BucketOutBsN = if this.$tm_useDualAxisBuckets? then this.$tm_bucketOutBsN else 0, $BucketOutStP = if this.$tm_useDualAxisBuckets? then this.$tm_bucketOutStP else 0, $BucketOutStN = if this.$tm_useDualAxisBuckets? then this.$tm_bucketOutStN else 0, $BucketOutAxP = if this.$tm_useDualAxisBuckets? then this.$tm_bucketOutAxP else 0, $BucketOutAxN = if this.$tm_useDualAxisBuckets? then this.$tm_bucketOutAxN else 0, $BucketOutCrP = 0, $BucketOutCrN = 0 ]
